_comment2: Copy this file and fill in your account details to get started.
_comment3: See README.md for full documentation of all configuration options.

metrics._comment_reporters: Uncomment ONE of the reporter sections below. If none is present, console-only output is used.

_csvReporter._comment: Writes per-metric CSV files to the specified directory.

_cosmosReporter._comment: Uploads all metrics with full dimensions to a Cosmos DB container.

_applicationInsightsReporter._comment: Sends all metrics to Azure Application Insights / Log Analytics.

tenantDefaults._comment: Default values inherited by all tenants. Tenants can override any field.

_examples._comment: Below are additional tenant configurations for reference (not active).

multiTenantReadWrite._comment: Example of multi-tenant: two tenants with different operations.

timeBasedRun._comment: Run for 10 minutes instead of a fixed number of operations.

multiCycleBenchmark._comment: Run 3 create-run-close cycles with 90s settle between cycles.
